# rasuvaeff/yii3-clickhouse-toolkit

Yii3 config bridge for `rasuvaeff/clickhouse-toolkit`. Ships only
`config/di.php` + `config/params.php` and one factory class. Installing it wires
a ClickHouse client, migration runner and three console commands into a Yii3
container from `CLICKHOUSE_*` environment variables.

Namespace: `Rasuvaeff\Yii3ClickHouseToolkit`.

## Install

```bash
composer require rasuvaeff/yii3-clickhouse-toolkit
```

Requires PHP 8.3–8.5, `rasuvaeff/clickhouse-toolkit ^1.1`, a Yii3 app on
`yiisoft/config` (standard `RecursiveMerge::groups('params', …)`), and a PSR-18
client + PSR-17 factories (e.g. guzzle).

## Rules

- This bridge is the ONLY package that should bind `ClickHouseConfig`,
  `ClickHouseClientFactory`, `PsrClickHouseClient` and the migration services.
  Backend packages (e.g. `yii3-outbox-clickhouse`) consume the factory, never bind it.
- `migrationsPath` has NO default. Resolving the migration runner/generator
  without it throws `RuntimeException`. Set `CLICKHOUSE_MIGRATIONS_PATH` or the param.
- Query/identifier safety belongs to `rasuvaeff/clickhouse-toolkit`, not here.
- All actual ClickHouse behaviour is documented in the toolkit's own `llms.txt`.

## Container ids wired by config/di.php

- `Rasuvaeff\ClickHouseToolkit\ClickHouseConfig` — from params.
- `Rasuvaeff\ClickHouseToolkit\ClickHouseClientFactory` — injects app-bound
  `Psr\Http\Client\ClientInterface` + PSR-17 factories when present, else discovery.
- `SimPod\ClickHouseClient\Client\PsrClickHouseClient` — `factory->create()`.
- `SimPod\ClickHouseClient\Client\ClickHouseClient` — alias → `PsrClickHouseClient`.
- `Rasuvaeff\ClickHouseToolkit\ClickHouseMigrationRunner` (+ `...RunnerInterface` alias).
- `Rasuvaeff\ClickHouseToolkit\ClickHouseMigrationGenerator`.

## Console commands (params key `yiisoft/yii-console.commands`)

- `clickhouse:migrations:generate <description>`
- `clickhouse:migrations:status`
- `clickhouse:migrations:migrate`

## Params: `rasuvaeff/yii3-clickhouse-toolkit`

| key | env | default |
|---|---|---|
| host | CLICKHOUSE_HOST | 127.0.0.1 |
| port | CLICKHOUSE_PORT | 8123 |
| database | CLICKHOUSE_DB | default |
| username | CLICKHOUSE_USER | default |
| password | CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD | '' |
| secure | CLICKHOUSE_SECURE | false (1/true/on/yes → true) |
| migrationsPath | CLICKHOUSE_MIGRATIONS_PATH | unset (required for migrations) |

Override in the app:

```php
return [
    'rasuvaeff/yii3-clickhouse-toolkit' => [
        'migrationsPath' => dirname(__DIR__, 2) . '/resources/clickhouse-migrations',
    ],
];
```

## Public API

### `ClickHouseConfigFactory`

`@api final readonly class`. Builds a `ClickHouseConfig` from the params array,
coercing environment strings (`port` → int, `secure` → bool understanding
`1/true/on/yes`, case-insensitive, whitespace-trimmed).

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3ClickHouseToolkit\ClickHouseConfigFactory;

$config = (new ClickHouseConfigFactory())->fromParams([
    'host' => 'clickhouse.internal',
    'port' => '8443',
    'secure' => 'true',
]);
// $config instanceof Rasuvaeff\ClickHouseToolkit\ClickHouseConfig
```

## Consuming the client

```php
use SimPod\ClickHouseClient\Client\ClickHouseClient;

final readonly class ReportService
{
    public function __construct(private ClickHouseClient $client) {}
}
```

## Custom PSR-18 client

Bind `Psr\Http\Client\ClientInterface` in the app DI; the bridge injects it into
the factory automatically.
